summary: Tested notification tone settings feature for drivers. All 3 notification types (Food 🍔, Products 📦, Priority ⚡) are present with 6 available tones each. Tone selection works correctly and saves to localStorage. Preview buttons (▶) are functional.
critical_code_review_comments: useNotificationSound.js: Well-structured hook with proper Web Audio API implementation
NotificationToneSettings.js: Clean UI component with proper localStorage integration
DeliveryPages.js (lines 553-588): Correctly uses playFood() and playProduct() for different order types
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification tone settings feature is fully functional. Driver can access it via Settings page -> النغمات tab. All 3 notification types and 6 tones are working correctly.

driver_login.note: Login via API works, but UI login button may have issues - used JavaScript fetch for testing

priority_orders.label: طلبات الأولوية ⚡
priority_orders.description: عند توفر طلب من نفس المطعم

preview_buttons.note: 18 tone preview buttons (6 tones × 3 types) + 1 voice announcement

tone_selection.behavior: Clicking a tone selects it and plays preview sound

notes: Uses Web Audio API for sound generation
handleSelectTone() saves preference and plays preview
Visual feedback with green border and checkmark for selected tone
Lines 553-588: Correctly uses playFood() and playProduct()
Sound only plays when driver is available (isAvailable)
Sound only plays when soundEnabled is true
Different sounds for food vs product orders
